name: @nowen/clipper
description: Nowen Note Web Clipper — 浏览器扩展，一键把网页剪藏到 nowen-note

scripts.build: vite build && npm run flatten-html && npm run copy-public
scripts.build:chrome: vite build && npm run flatten-html && node scripts/copy-public.mjs --browser=chrome
scripts.build:edge: vite build && npm run flatten-html && node scripts/copy-public.mjs --browser=edge
scripts.build:firefox: vite build && npm run flatten-html && node scripts/copy-public.mjs --browser=firefox
scripts.pack:all: npm run pack:chrome && npm run pack:edge && npm run pack:firefox
